On a lively winter night street filled with bright storefront lights and sparkling city reflections, a young Japanese woman in a glossy gold puffer jacket with a soft fur collar stands facing the camera holding shopping bags, and the video begins mid-phrase at the exact moment the intro vocal is already in progress, her mouth clearly open and forming a syllable as she continues singing without interruption. Throughout the entire clip, she maintains continuous, highly visible lip movement that precisely articulates each vowel and consonant, with slightly exaggerated but natural mouth shapes to ensure strong, readable lip-sync performance. The camera remains completely stable in a steady medium close-up framing that consistently keeps her face centered and her mouth fully visible, never obstructed by her hands or the shopping bags. As she sings through the intro, she smiles warmly, then shyly glances slightly away from the lens and briefly lowers her gaze with a bashful, tender expression, yet her singing never stops and her lips remain clearly active and synchronized at all times. Subtle head tilts and gentle eye movements add realism and charm while preserving full visibility of her mouth. The surrounding city glows with a busy, festive winter atmosphere, enhancing the energetic yet sweet mood, while the lip-sync clarity remains the absolute priority from the first visible syllable to the end of the scene.
